use_cases: Copying code snippets in documentation or IDE-like interfaces
Copying share links or URLs for easy distribution
Copying text content like API keys or credentials
Copying product links or referral codes in e-commerce
Copying configuration values or environment variables
ai_summary: A compact copy button component featuring a smooth cross-fade animation between copy and check icons. The button uses a dark theme (#3f3f46) with rounded corners and automatic state reset after 2 seconds, providing clear visual feedback when content is successfully copied to clipboard.
